calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-08-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Defendants Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Nov-01-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT THREE BELL CAPITAL, LLC, JONATHAN PORTER, ERIC PATTERSON, ANDRE HUAMAN's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

Defendants Jonathan Porter, Eric Patterson and Andre Huaman's motion to confirm arbitration award is granted. The award is confirmed because there is no basis to vacate the award under the California Arbitration Act. Defendant Three Bell Capital, LLC is not entitled to confirmation of the award as all parties acknowledge that it is a suspended corporation.

Order is signed. Proposed Judgment submitted by email to be reviewed.* (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR #11185, email:ADelgado@sftc.org, Reported. (D302)

*After the hearing, the Judgment is signed. (see scanned judgment for details)*

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Litigation Pending Outcome Of Arbitration
Off Calendar Sep-21-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF SEAN SNYDER'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Litigation Pending Outcome Of Arbitration is OFF CALENDAR. The court signed the parties' stipulated order to stay this case pending the arbitration, but removed the proposed language in the order regarding an arbitration review hearing date.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)
